subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-08-20 in Ramleh
subcodes.first_line: ...this Blessed Cause has such great power that it shall, ere long, vanquish all opposition. We must live and act in such manner as not to lower the station of the Cause
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @exalting the Word of God in teaching the Cause, @growth of the Cause
